Press & Media Kit

Richard
Bishop

Post-Grunge Hard Rock  ·  Blues-Rock  ·  Fairfield, Iowa
About

Richard Bishop is an independent post-grunge hard rock and blues-rock artist from Fairfield, Iowa. Combat veteran. Single father. Bridge builder. No label. No management. No backing.

His debut album Still Standing — 11 tracks — released April 28, 2026 on all major streaming platforms. Drop-C tuning. Deep baritone vocals. Heavy distorted guitar. Lyrics that don't flinch. The kind of music that doesn't ask permission.

Sounds like Theory of a Deadman Jelly Roll Everlast Seether Staind
Press
"Richard Bishop tackles the heartbreaking reality of veteran suicide in his new hard rock single, 'Blood and Dirt.' After surviving the war, the battle shouldn't continue at home."
— Jamsphere Magazine
